caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT" and "AN" printed on it, a black baseball cap with a logo, and large grey over-ear headphones. He has a gold chain and a watch on his left wrist. A professional microphone on a stand is positioned in front of him. In the background, a white wall features the text "HUSTLE" and several gold stars. To the right, a partial view of a screen displays the letters "LK 101". Overlaid on the bottom of the scene are logos for "BOSS TALK 101" and a "PODCAST" logo. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his gaze and slightly adjusts his facial expression, looking from the left toward the right, while his hands move from his chin toward his lap.
